The engine must not silently recollect inputs or substitute live state.

exact_replay_preconditions.operator_visible_effect: Replay requests surface which exact-basis condition passed or blocked before execution begins.

idempotent_rerun_guarantees.authority_safety_posture: Terminal idempotent retry must not create a continuation child merely because continuation could be legal.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.operator_visible_effect: Operators see a terminal idempotent reuse outcome rather than fresh execution.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.recovery_posture: Terminal same-manifest retry reuses the prior terminal result instead of creating new lineage.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.state_or_outcome: The existing persisted DecisionBundle is returned; no continuation child is allocated.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.trigger_or_entry_condition: An exact same-request terminal rerun arrives against a completed manifest.

idempotent_rerun_guarantees.authority_safety_posture: Duplicate replay execution may not silently fork parallel replay children.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.operator_visible_effect: Replay history shows one canonical replay child per identical replay request.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.recovery_posture: Replay child allocation is idempotent across identical replay intent.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.state_or_outcome: The existing replay child and ReplayAttestation are returned instead of allocating a duplicate child.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.trigger_or_entry_condition: An exact same-request replay rerun arrives for the same replay target and class.

idempotent_rerun_guarantees.authority_safety_posture: Ambient state may not change the reused sealed context.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.operator_visible_effect: Schedulers can prove pre-start context reuse without recomputing pre-seal state.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.recovery_posture: Same-manifest pre-start retries reuse persisted pre-seal tape.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.state_or_outcome: The already sealed context is reused instead of recollecting inputs or re-evaluating the pre-seal chain.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.trigger_or_entry_condition: An exact same-request retry arrives against a still-pre-start sealed manifest.

idempotent_rerun_guarantees.authority_safety_posture: Authority or workflow side effects resume from durable lineage rather than duplicate sends.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.operator_visible_effect: Operators can reason about one interrupted attempt that resumed rather than multiple independent attempts.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.recovery_posture: Recovery preserves lineage-safe identity instead of starting a fresh child.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.state_or_outcome: Same-attempt recovery preserves lineage and basis identity across retries and reclaims.
idempotent_rerun_guarantees.trigger_or_entry_condition: A same-attempt recovery resumes an interrupted execution.

recovery_and_continuation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Transport resume metadata cannot authorize replay legality or workflow mutation.
notes: The same rule applies to calm-shell, portal, workspace, and projection artifacts.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.operator_visible_effect: UX continuity is available without confusing it for execution or authority truth.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.recovery_posture: Read-side continuity can resume while control-plane lineage remains anchored in manifest artifacts.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.state_or_outcome: Transport and UX resume metadata remains read-side recovery context, never replay lineage truth.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: Transport, shell, or stream resume metadata is available during replay or recovery.

recovery_and_continuation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Recovery must continue from durable receipts and claims, not broker silence or worker memory.
notes: Same-attempt recovery children reuse the original `attempt_lineage_ref`.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.operator_visible_effect: Operators can distinguish exact same-attempt recovery from historically explicit continuation.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.recovery_posture: Same-attempt recovery is exact and not a fresh-child continuation.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.state_or_outcome: RECOVERY_CHILD reuses the exact frozen config and input basis and preserves `execution_basis_hash`.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: A started attempt is being recovered under the same attempt lineage.

recovery_and_continuation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Historical explicit reuse may not pretend to be current freshness or same-attempt recovery.
notes: Non-replay children may reuse config or input only when they declare historical explicit inheritance.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.operator_visible_effect: Explainers can show why a child reused history without implying exact historical equivalence.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.recovery_posture: Historically explicit continuation is distinct from recovery and from exact replay.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.state_or_outcome: Historically explicit continuation is legal only when the child declares `HISTORICAL_EXPLICIT` and carries limitation metadata.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: A non-replay child reuses historical config or input outside same-attempt recovery.

recovery_and_continuation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Counterfactual replay remains non-mutating even when it models authority interpretation changes.
notes: Declared dimensions: config_only, input_only, policy_or_formula_only, authority_interpretation_only, mixed_basis.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.operator_visible_effect: Analysts can see the declared basis dimensions instead of reverse-engineering them from mismatches.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.recovery_posture: Analysis-only counterfactual replay never publishes exact-match semantics when basis changed.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.state_or_outcome: Counterfactual replay must declare which basis dimensions changed and classify difference as expected or limited.
recovery_and_continuation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: Counterfactual analysis changes one or more basis dimensions.

replay_classes.authority_safety_posture: Replay classes may not silently widen into live mutation semantics.
notes: Must retain compliance posture and may not carry `counterfactual_basis`.
Non-deterministic allowlist must remain empty.
replay_classes.operator_visible_effect: Replay tooling exposes the replay class explicitly before any comparison result is rendered.
replay_classes.recovery_posture: Replay child reuse is idempotent for identical replay intent.
replay_classes.state_or_outcome: Exact compliance-grade replay under historical-read-only posture.
replay_classes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Caller requests an exact historical rerun against a sealed historical manifest.

replay_classes.authority_safety_posture: Replay classes may not silently widen into live mutation semantics.
notes: Equivalent to STANDARD_REPLAY in basis law; audit intent may not be smuggled into analysis-only replay.
replay_classes.operator_visible_effect: Replay tooling exposes the replay class explicitly before any comparison result is rendered.
replay_classes.recovery_posture: Replay child reuse is idempotent for identical replay intent.
replay_classes.state_or_outcome: Exact replay semantics identical to STANDARD_REPLAY with audit-facing explanation posture.
replay_classes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Auditor, regulator, or dispute-resolution flow requests historical replay with evidentiary intent.

replay_classes.authority_safety_posture: Replay classes may not silently widen into live mutation semantics.
notes: Counterfactual analysis must never mutate authoritative run history or authority-facing state.
Declared dimensions are limited to config, input, policy/formula, authority interpretation, or mixed basis.
replay_classes.operator_visible_effect: Replay tooling exposes the replay class explicitly before any comparison result is rendered.
replay_classes.recovery_posture: Replay child reuse is idempotent for identical replay intent.
replay_classes.state_or_outcome: Analysis-only replay that must classify expected equivalence, expected difference, or unexpected mismatch.
replay_classes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Analysis-mode replay intentionally changes one or more declared basis dimensions.

retention_limit_postures.authority_safety_posture: Retention must not rewrite basis hashes or swap in newer content.
retention_limit_postures.operator_visible_effect: Operators can distinguish lawful minimization from corruption or silent data loss.
retention_limit_postures.recovery_posture: Replay and audit remain possible even when payloads were minimized, provided limitation posture is explicit.
retention_limit_postures.state_or_outcome: Retention must preserve or explicitly placeholder the minimum replay basis for the full lawful review window.
retention_limit_postures.trigger_or_entry_condition: A material run enters the lawful review window for replay and audit.

retention_limit_postures.authority_safety_posture: Erasure cannot resolve authority-facing ambiguity by deleting evidence.
notes: Surviving derived artifacts must point to explicit expired/erased placeholders or limitation notes.
retention_limit_postures.operator_visible_effect: Investigators see why comparison became limited and what supporting history was lawfully hidden or erased.
retention_limit_postures.recovery_posture: Limited historical comparison remains explicit rather than mutating exact replay semantics.
retention_limit_postures.state_or_outcome: Replay must surface RETENTION_LIMITED or equivalent instead of silently treating minimized basis as unavailable or not applicable.
retention_limit_postures.trigger_or_entry_condition: Payload minimization or erasure removed underlying content while preserving replay placeholders or hashes.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Replay classes may not silently widen into live mutation semantics.
notes: Must retain compliance posture and may not carry `counterfactual_basis`.
Non-deterministic allowlist must remain empty.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Replay tooling exposes the replay class explicitly before any comparison result is rendered.
rows.recovery_posture: Replay child reuse is idempotent for identical replay intent.
rows.state_or_outcome: Exact compliance-grade replay under historical-read-only posture.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Caller requests an exact historical rerun against a sealed historical manifest.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Authority or workflow side effects resume from durable lineage rather than duplicate sends.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Operators can reason about one interrupted attempt that resumed rather than multiple independent attempts.
rows.recovery_posture: Recovery preserves lineage-safe identity instead of starting a fresh child.
rows.state_or_outcome: Same-attempt recovery preserves lineage and basis identity across retries and reclaims.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: A same-attempt recovery resumes an interrupted execution.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Retention must not rewrite basis hashes or swap in newer content.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Operators can distinguish lawful minimization from corruption or silent data loss.
rows.recovery_posture: Replay and audit remain possible even when payloads were minimized, provided limitation posture is explicit.
rows.state_or_outcome: Retention must preserve or explicitly placeholder the minimum replay basis for the full lawful review window.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: A material run enters the lawful review window for replay and audit.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Erasure cannot resolve authority-facing ambiguity by deleting evidence.
notes: Surviving derived artifacts must point to explicit expired/erased placeholders or limitation notes.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Investigators see why comparison became limited and what supporting history was lawfully hidden or erased.
rows.recovery_posture: Limited historical comparison remains explicit rather than mutating exact replay semantics.
rows.state_or_outcome: Replay must surface RETENTION_LIMITED or equivalent instead of silently treating minimized basis as unavailable or not applicable.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Payload minimization or erasure removed underlying content while preserving replay placeholders or hashes.
